title: ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
